task_completion.description: Agent opens and views the new_hires.json file to access candidate data and boilerplate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or other application displays the contents of new_hires.json, showing candidate names, salaries, and other details.
The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent includes candidate-specific details in the offer letter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer document shows candidate names (e.g., Amara Okonkwo), job titles, and salaries, either as manually typed text or as mail merge fields.

task_completion.description: Agent includes all required letter components specified in the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer document visibly contains text or fields for department, start date, work location, employment type, a reference to company benefits, and a signature block for CEO Robert Flanagan.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the offer letters with the correct filenames in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the files being saved as .odt in /home/ga/Documents/ with the specified naming convention (e.g., offer_letter_Okonkwo_Amara.odt), with evidence of multiple files being saved.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the documents, rather than a background script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the OpenOffice Writer interface (typing, formatting, or mail merge setup), not just terminal commands generating files.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually saved the files through the OpenOffice application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog of OpenOffice is visible, or the agent is seen exporting/saving the documents directly from the word processor GUI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent drafted the content and didn't just copy pre-existing files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drafting process (entering text, pasting boilerplate, or setting up fields) is visible in the screenshots over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 5 candidates must receive letters: Amara Okonkwo ($87,500, Regulatory Affairs Specialist II), Kevin Tremblay ($92,000, Quality Systems Engineer), Preethi Nair ($118,000, Senior R&D Engineer – Biomaterials), Jordan Vasquez ($68,000, Field Service Technician), Marcus Petrov ($105,000, Clinical Affairs Manager). Required fields in each letter: job title, department, salary, start date, work location, employment type, company benefits reference, and CEO Robert Flanagan signature block. Output directory: /home/ga/Documents/. Expected filenames: offer_letter_Okonkwo_Amara.odt, offer_letter_Tremblay_Kevin.odt, offer_letter_Nair_Preethi.odt, offer_letter_Vasquez_Jordan.odt, offer_letter_Petrov_Marcus.odt.
